title: Brazilian Shrimp Fajitas
description: A flavorful Mexican-inspired dish featuring shrimp, garlicky and crumbly elements, in a classic fajita style. This recipe highlights the rich flavors of Brazilian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Brazilian-style shrimp
ingredients.amount: 1 pound large shrimp, peeled and deveined

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the sliced onions and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to caramelize.
Add the crumbled queso fresco to the skillet and stir to combine with the onions.
Add the Brazilian-style shrimp to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are pink and cooked through.
Add the dried feijoada spices to the skillet and stir to combine with the shrimp and onions.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the fajitas by placing a portion of the shrimp and onion mixture onto a tortilla, followed by a dollop of sour cream and a sprinkle of cilantro.
Serve the fajitas immediately, with lime wedges on the side.
Optional: top with additional queso fresco and/or sliced radishes for added flavor and texture.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as Mexican street corn or refried beans.
Enjoy your delicious Brazilian Shrimp Fajitas!
